design_philosophy: Sleek, elite, and 'Street-Pro' aesthetic. Think luxury watch marketing for the sport of billiards. Everything is obsidian black, pure white, with high contrast. Deep shadows, subtle glass textures, crisp typography.

rules: H1 must be cinematic: tracking-tighter, text-5xl to text-6xl+ (fluid clamp where possible).
Overlines must be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs text-white/60.
Use font-black for major numbers and the main brand hook.
Absolutely no generic sans-serifs (Inter, Roboto) for headings.

layout_and_spacing.card_style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden

components_and_sections.name: Global Shell
components_and_sections.rules: No Navigation Bar. Background color pure #050505. Smooth scrolling enabled (lenis). Use lucide-react for icons. Dark mode only.
components_and_sections.implementation_notes: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for layout structure. No Shadcn full-page wrappers to allow creative layouts.

components_and_sections.name: Hero Section
components_and_sections.layout: min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center relative px-6 overflow-hidden
components_and_sections.visuals: Background uses 'hero_background' with a heavy bg-black/80 overlay to ensure text readability.
components_and_sections.content: Top: The 'brand_logo_icon' (8-ball logo, max-w-[80px]). Center: H1 'Every frame. Every win. Every stat. Rackup.'. Below: App Store / Play Store styled as luxury solid white buttons with black text and lucide icons.
components_and_sections.animations: Framer motion staggered fade-up for all text elements. Slow parallax on background image.

components_and_sections.name: Graphic Showcase
components_and_sections.layout: py-24 flex justify-center relative w-full overflow-hidden
components_and_sections.visuals: Build a CSS-based smartphone mockup (rounded-[3rem], border-8 border-white/5, bg-[#0a0a0a] shadow-2xl relative w-[320px] h-[650px] overflow-hidden) OR use the 'dark_phone_mockup' as an image. Inside the CSS mockup, render a fake 'Leaderboard UI' using HTML/Tailwind: tiny avatars, high-contrast rows, neon white text, simulating a luxury sports app.

content.title: Pro-Grade Standings
content.visual: Mockup of a sleek standings table inside the card. Use a dark, stripped-down Shadcn Table look.

content.title: Instant Entry
content.visual: Large typography displaying a 6-digit room code with a 'copy' icon. E.g., 'R K P - 8 8 2'.
content.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col justify-center

content.title: Career Stats
content.visual: A stylized, high-contrast chart or stats grid showing win-rate. Use simple CSS bars or large stat numbers (e.g., '78% Win Rate').
content.style: bg-white text-black rounded-2xl p-8 (Inverted contrast card for impact)

components_and_sections.name: Footer
components_and_sections.layout: py-32 border-t border-white/5 text-center relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center
components_and_sections.content: Support link (mailto:support@rackupapp.com), About blurb, Privacy Policy / Terms placeholders. Massive 'RACKUP' watermark text (text-[15vw] font-black text-white/[0.02]) spanning the background.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, and major sections MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="hero-app-store-btn"', 'data-testid="bento-card-standings"').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against the #050505 background passes WCAG AA. Use text-shadow if placed over an image.
